prompt: Create a settings form module called search_settings for configuring search parameters on our Drupal 10 Open Social site. The form at /admin/config/search/search-settings should have fields for: similarity_threshold (number, default 0.7), result_limit (number, default 5), and cache_ttl (number, default 300). Save all settings to config. Include a config schema file. We want D11 compatibility.
notes: Both produce identical quality ConfigFormBase code. Sonnet already knows ConfigFormBase, getEditableConfigNames(), parent::buildForm/submitForm, config schema types, and $this->config() patterns. Without-skill even included config/install defaults while with-skill did not. Forms API is well within Sonnet training data.
